data.body: CHECKPOINT 3+4: Implementation complete. Expanded Step 6 in per-worktree-review-commit.md with: explicit conflict detection (exit != 0), git merge --abort, ticket comment command, conflict queue with DO NOT remove worktree, continue processing next worktree. Added 'Conflict queue - re-implementation protocol' section: serialized re-implementation against latest session state, full Steps 2-7 flow for each, escalate to user on second conflict. Acceptance criteria: both greps PASS. Tests: 21/21 PASS (0 failures).
